com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Enum MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime>
      • com.pax.poslink.peripheries.MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Comparable<MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime>
    Enclosing class:
    MiscSettings

    public static enum MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime
extends java.lang.Enum<MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime>
    Screen timeout options in Settings

    • Enum Constant Summary

      Enum Constants 
      Enum Constant and Description
      EIGHT_HOUR
      Screen timeout - 8 hour
      FIFTEEN_SECONDS
      Screen timeout - 15 seconds

      Screen timeout - Never

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime c : MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static MiscSettings.ScreenOffTime valueOf(java.lang.String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if the argument is null
